nasb.text: that Your name may be magnified forever, by saying, ‘The Lord of hosts is God over Israel’; and may the house of Your servant David be established before You.

esv.text: And your name will be magnified forever, saying, ‘The Lord of hosts is God over Israel,’ and the house of your servant David will be established before you.

cnv.text: 這樣，你的名必永遠為大，以致人要說：‘萬軍之耶和華是以色列的　神。’你僕人大衛的家也必在你面前得堅立。

ccb.text: 这样，你的名必永远被尊崇，人们必说，‘万军之耶和华是治理以色列的上帝。’愿你仆人大卫的家在你面前坚立。
